channel.title: Crumb Structure
channel.description: Fresh takes for home sourdough bakers.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/AskBaking is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the whole grain community this week.

item.title: The scoring checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified scoring purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of hydration
item.description: The most common early stumbles in hydration, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home sourdough bakers.

item.title: "sourdough schedule for workers" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about sourdough schedule for workers through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: The state of Starters in 2026
item.description: A field report on starters: where things stand, and what home sourdough bakers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Hydration without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to hydration for home sourdough bakers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "sourdough starter troubleshooting" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "sourdough starter troubleshooting" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why home sourdough bakers are rethinking Scoring
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how home sourdough bakers approach scoring — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Whole Grain on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in whole grain — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Hydration: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping hydration for home sourdough bakers.
